author: y4rr
content: Observation: BEFORE probes (pre-V.2) — all 5 B.5.b MobileNetV2 and MobileNetV3-Small shape/finite/param/custom-classes/determinism tests passed. AFTER probes (post-V.2) — 5 new fixture-backed tests per model added (10 total for mobilenet_v2_v2_* and mobilenet_v3_small_v2_*), all 10 passing. No source changes to mobilenet.rs required.
